text_preview:
Pelotas, RS, April 18, 1976.

## In a letter addressed to the Ministry of Aeronautics, the president of a UFO research group in the city of Pelotas, State of Rio Grande do Sul, [Pelotense Society for Investigation and Research of Flying Saucers] reports a close encounter of a tractor driver with humans unidentified.

## TRANSLATION

[…] “About, the phenomena observed at Fazenda Triângulo Azul”, in Capão do Leão, City of Pelotas, we have been there for the last 3 months, and in one of those days we could still see the repetition of the luminous phenomena. On that occasion, a tractor driver from
summary: A tractor driver at Fazenda Triângulo Azul reported three strange beings appearing out of fog and circling his tractor, described as 'saints in light blue dresses'.
